creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: This isn't really a good place to acquire about hardware compatibility, sorry.  I suggest trying to ask on the freebsd-net mailing list (https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-net) or the FreeBSD forums (https://forums.freebsd.org/) to see if others can report some success with this hardware.  Or, contact the vendor directly to see if they can comment on FreeBSD support.
